narrative:
Precinct Summit (precinct in Monroe County) has 430 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 18.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 31.4%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 13.0 percentage points.
